acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_prose_001] PASS if the revised versions of the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:383, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:397, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:593 contain at most one explicit 'Not X / Not Y' style gloss and the remaining beats communicate their force through distinct syntax plus observable reaction or scene consequence. FAIL if three or more of those cited beats still rely on the same negation-ladder explanation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised versions of the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:383, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:397, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:593 contain at most one explicit 'Not X / Not Y' style gloss and the remaining beats communicate their force through distinct syntax plus observable reaction or scene consequence. FAIL if three or more of those cited beats still rely on the same negation-ladder explanation.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly falls back on the same negation-gloss construction to explain why a line or gesture lands ('Not X. Not Y.'). That habit becomes visible enough to flatten surprise and makes the narrator pre-interpret Eli for the reader instead of letting the scene's exact dialogue and Lena's embodied reaction do the work.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the calibration beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:383, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:397, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:593 so the distinctions land through fresher sentence shapes, silence, or concrete bodily/social consequence. Keep Lena's evaluative intelligence, but stop repeatedly framing Eli's effect by listing what his line is not.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
